problem: Why does quantum superposition collapse — can decoherence be prevented at scale?
hypothesis: Quantum tunneling through energy barrier may resolve Why does quantum superposition collapse — can decoherence be prevented at scale? by activating at the systems level.

experiment.protocol: Calorimetric measurement with 10 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: What we observe is not nature itself but nature exposed to our method of questioning. — Heisenberg
